name: I'm on a Merry-Go-Round
hints: You're on the merry-go-round floor. There's a wooden horse you can ride.
GO HORS or RIDE HORS to mount the wooden horse and ride up.
Riding the horse takes you to room 7, where you can climb the pole to reach the top.
D goes to the large room with the calliope (room 21). The horse is your way to reach the catwalk above.
notes: Merry-go-round floor. GO HORS to mount and ride to room 7 (on the horse). D=large room with calliope (room 21).
